best_practices.title: Passenger Nationality and Country of Residence Validation
best_practices.description: Nationality and residence checks are mandatory for all customers. These fields are required in SearchHotels, GetRooms, ConfirmBooking, and saveBooking requests.
best_practices.implementation: Use the getallcountries command from the Internal Codes section to get the list of valid country codes (DOTW internal codes)

best_practices.title: Passenger Name Formatting
best_practices.description: Names must follow strict formatting rules enforced by suppliers
rules: Minimum 2 characters, maximum 25 characters per name
No duplicate names allowed for multiple passengers
No white spaces, numbers, or special characters
Multi-word names should be trimmed of extra white spaces
All passenger names (including children) must be passed in savebooking/confirmbooking
best_practices.example: Full Name: James Lee Happy Traveler becomes firstName=JamesLee, lastName=HappyTraveler

best_practices.title: Tariff Notes Display
best_practices.description: The <tariffNotes> tag in getRooms response must be displayed to customers as it contains critical information from suppliers
best_practices.content: Can include cancellation policies, meal plans, children bedding policies, and other restrictions

best_practices.title: Payment Guarantee Information on Vouchers
best_practices.description: The <paymentGuaranteedBy> tag from confirmBooking response must be displayed on the customer voucher
best_practices.example: Format: 'Payment is guaranteed by: DOTW, as per final booking form reference No: HTL-AE2-7159****'

best_practices.title: Minimum Stay Policy Handling
best_practices.description: Handle minStay and dateApplyMinStay elements returned in search results
best_practices.logic: If minStay is empty = no minimum stay rule. If populated = minimum number of nights required
options: Filter out rooms with minimum stay > requested nights (can be done by DOTW)
Display minimum stay requirement to customer before booking
Implement validation to prevent booking violating minimum stay

best_practices.title: Occupancy Restrictions for Children
best_practices.description: Hotel occupancy has specific constraints for children
constraints: Maximum of 2 children per adult declared in occupancy

best_practices.title: Allocation Details Management
best_practices.description: Allocation details must be correctly passed through the booking flow
best_practices.workflow: getAllocation details from getRooms (with blocking) response → Pass in confirmBooking/saveBooking request with exact values
best_practices.impact: Incorrect allocation details will cause booking confirmation failures

best_practices.title: Advance Purchase Rates (APR) Handling
best_practices.description: APRs are non-refundable rates marked with 'nonrefundable=YES' attribute
characteristics: Comes with nonrefundable flag in response

best_practices.title: Minimum Selling Price (MSP) Compliance
best_practices.description: For B2C or Tech Platform distributions, MSP must be enforced
requirements: Obtain MinimumSelling and PriceMinimumSelling elements from response
Display MSP or higher price to end customer (mandatory)
Non-negotiable for direct connectivity with hotel chains

best_practices.title: SearchHotels Performance Optimization
best_practices.description: Use hotelID-based searches instead of city-wide searches for better performance
best_practices.optimization: Group hotels by 50 per request to reduce response time
best_practices.example: For 700 hotels in Dubai, send 14 requests with 50 hotelIds each instead of single request
best_practices.expected_improvement: Response time guaranteed under 8 seconds on average

best_practices.title: Static Data Download
best_practices.description: Use dedicated static data download method for inventory initialization
best_practices.reference: See Startup guide/Static Data Download Guide section in documentation
best_practices.usage: Obtain hotel inventory for initial setup and periodic updates

best_practices.title: Price and Cancellation Policy Source
best_practices.description: Always obtain pricing and policy information from getRooms response
best_practices.workflow: When hotel selected from availability list → Send getRooms (without roomTypeSelected node) → Extract accurate price and cancellation policy
best_practices.impact: Using other sources can result in incorrect policies

best_practices.title: SSL Certificate Validation
best_practices.description: All API connections use strict SSL validation
best_practices.configuration: strictSSL should be set to true in requests

pitfalls.solution: Always validate against getallcountries before submission

pitfalls.pitfall: Using Formatted Price Instead of Raw Value for Charges
pitfalls.consequence: Incorrect charge amounts in cancellation, customer disputes
pitfalls.solution: Always extract the numeric value, not the formatted string

pitfalls.pitfall: Not Passing All Passenger Names in Confirmation
pitfalls.consequence: Supplier rejection during final booking confirmation
pitfalls.solution: Include all passengers (adults and children) in savebooking/confirmbooking with proper formatting

pitfalls.pitfall: Ignoring Tariff Notes and Payment Guarantee Information
pitfalls.consequence: Customer dissatisfaction, disputes about undisclosed policies
pitfalls.solution: Display both tariff notes and payment guarantee details prominently

pitfalls.pitfall: Allowing Bookings that Violate Minimum Stay Policy
pitfalls.detection: Check minStay element and validate against requested nights

pitfalls.consequence: Booking rejection for violating occupancy rules
pitfalls.rules: Max 2 children per adult, max 4 per room, ages 1-12

pitfalls.pitfall: Sending Incorrect Allocation Details to ConfirmBooking
pitfalls.solution: Copy allocation details exactly as returned from getRooms blocking response

pitfalls.pitfall: Not Implementing SearchHotels by HotelID Optimization
pitfalls.consequence: Slow response times (> 8 seconds average), customer timeouts
pitfalls.solution: Group hotels in batches of 50 for each request

pitfalls.consequence: Contract violation with hotel chains, account suspension
pitfalls.solution: Always validate and enforce MSP from API response

pitfalls.consequence: Incorrect rates shown to customer (stale or inaccurate data)
pitfalls.solution: Always use getRooms response as single source of truth for pricing

pitfalls.pitfall: Not Including Passenger Name Formatting Validation
pitfalls.consequence: Supplier rejection due to name format rules
pitfalls.rules: 2-25 chars, no spaces/numbers/special chars, unique per passenger

pitfalls.process: 1st call (confirm=no) gets charge → 2nd call (confirm=yes) must pass exact charge in penaltyApplied

optimization_tips.benefit: Reduces response time to under 8 seconds average
optimization_tips.implementation: For N hotels, create ceil(N/50) separate requests with hotelId filters

optimization_tips.technique: Use hotelID-based search instead of city-wide search
optimization_tips.benefit: Significantly faster responses for targeted hotel searches
optimization_tips.tradeoff: Requires knowing hotel IDs upfront (use static data download)

optimization_tips.technique: Implement static data download for hotel inventory
optimization_tips.benefit: Reduces repeated searchHotels calls for basic info, faster UI loading
optimization_tips.frequency: Periodic updates as per supplier schedule

optimization_tips.technique: Pre-validate occupancy against constraints before API call
optimization_tips.benefit: Catch invalid configurations early, improve UX

optimization_tips.technique: Cache allocation details and room availability between steps
optimization_tips.benefit: Reduces need for repeated getRooms calls

optimization_tips.technique: Implement retry logic with exponential backoff for timeouts

common_causes: Passenger names not properly formatted (spaces, special chars, invalid length)
Missing children passenger names in confirmation
resolution: Validate all passenger data before submission
Verify allocation details match getRooms response exactly
Check passenger name formatting rules: 2-25 chars, no spaces
Validate occupancy: max 2 children/adult, max 4/room
Ensure all passengers (adults and children) included

common_causes: Using stale pricing from search instead of getRooms
Rate basis mismatch between search and booking
resolution: Always use getRooms response as source of truth for pricing
Verify currency code is consistent throughout flow
Confirm rateBasis matches between steps
Check minStay element and validate against booking dates
Verify child ages are 1-12
Enforce max 2 children per adult, max 4 per room
Validate total occupancy against room capacity
Split searchHotels into batches of 50 hotelIds maximum
Implement timeout with retry logic (3x with exponential backoff)
Monitor and log response times for optimization
Verify credentials are correct
Confirm password is MD5 hashed
Check customer ID is valid in system

common_causes: Using formatted price instead of raw numeric value
Not passing penalty from first cancellation step to second
resolution: Extract raw numeric value from response, not <formatted> tag
In confirmbooking (confirm=yes), pass exact charge from previous step in penaltyApplied

common_causes: Displaying price below MSP to customer
Not implementing MSP check for B2C platforms
resolution: Always check MinimumSelling and PriceMinimumSelling elements
Enforce MSP >= displayed price to customers
Implement audit logging for compliance

test_flows.description: Full booking workflow for 1 room with 2 adults, 0 children

steps.validation: Check for rooms with rates, verify minStay and tariffNotes present
Verify rates match, check for paymentGuaranteedBy, capture allocationDetails
Confirm allocation details returned, verify room still available
Verify booking confirmed, capture booking reference, check paymentGuaranteedBy in response

assertions: All responses contain status=OK or success indicator
Passenger names properly formatted (no spaces, 2-25 chars)
Allocation details unchanged between getRooms and confirmBooking
Payment guarantee information present in final response
Booking reference generated successfully

test_flows.flow_name: Multi-Room Booking - 2 Rooms with Mixed Occupancy
test_flows.description: Booking 2 rooms: Room 1 (2 adults), Room 2 (2 adults + 1 child age 10)

steps.validation: Verify both room types available, check child age is 1-12
Compare rates for both rooms, verify tariffNotes for each
Allocation details captured for both rooms
All 5 passengers included with proper formatting, occupancy rules respected

assertions: Child age 10 is within 1-12 range
Max 2 children per adult satisfied for both rooms
Total children (1) <= 4 per room
Both rooms contain proper passenger details
Allocation details for both rooms passed correctly

steps.validation: Extract <charge> value (raw number, not formatted), check if penalty applies
Verify penalty amount matches exactly, cancellation processed

assertions: Raw numeric charge value extracted (not formatted string)
Penalty value from step 1 passed exactly to step 2
Cancellation completed successfully

test_flows.description: Download hotel inventory for offline reference

steps.validation: Verify all hotel attributes returned, no pricing data (noPrice=true)

assertions: Complete hotel inventory retrieved
No pricing data included
All requested fields populated
Can be cached for offline reference

test_flows.description: Optimized search using hotel ID batching

steps.note: This is 1 of 14 requests for 700 hotels
steps.validation: Response time monitored, should be < 8 seconds per batch of 50

steps.note: Repeat step 1 with next 50 hotelIds until all 700 processed

assertions: Each request contains max 50 hotelIds
Response time < 8 seconds average per request
All 700 hotels retrieved in 14 requests

rate_limiting.general_guidance: DOTW documentation does not explicitly specify rate limits; refer to supplier SLA

recommendations.batch_strategy: Use hotel ID batching (50 per request) to stay under rate limits
recommendations.timeout_handling: Set socket timeout 30s minimum, read timeout 60s
recommendations.concurrent_requests: No explicit limit documented; recommend <= 5 concurrent to be safe
recommendations.caching: Cache static data and allocation details within session to reduce API calls

currency_handling.requirement: Currency code required in all requests
currency_handling.source: Use getcurrenciesids method to get valid codes
currency_handling.consistency: Must be same currency throughout booking flow
currency_handling.note: Currency code is numeric (e.g., 769 for AED)

occupancy_rules.validation: Must validate before API call to provide better UX

date_handling.timezone: Use hotel local time unless specified
date_handling.minimum_stay: Always check minStay and dateApplyMinStay in response

ssl_certificates.certificate_pinning: Consider for production to prevent MITM attacks

special_requests.empty_bookings: Send with count=0 if no special requests

bedding_preferences.variants: Twin beds, double bed, etc. (codes from documentation)

payment_methods.guarantee: Payment guarantee provided by DOTW for booking
